creator: ben@unpatched.de
text:
Created attachment 152616
Patch for Time::Normalize in deskutils/plans

This is a known bug (https://groups.google.com/forum/#!topic/planscalendar/svYVlr7gJp0)
However the upstream developer didn't release an update for this. So I made a patch for the port.

Patch is tested locally and works fine.
